reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Commented that the function name mm_prepare_for_swap_entries() is self-explaining, suggesting no changes are needed.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch extracts a helper function mm_prepare_for_swap_entries() to ensure the mm is added to init_mm.mmlist for swapoff to find and unuse its swap entries, addressing double-checked locking in try_to_unmap_one() and copy_nonpresent_pte(). The function will be reused by upcoming PMD-level swap entry code paths.
